Smart Homes, Seattle Strong

Transforming Puget Sound homes with intuitive technology. Designed for Seattle's unique climate and architecture.

Call Now: 555-sma-r91

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Built for the Northwest

Founded in 2012, Summit Smart Home began as two Microsoft engineers solving moisture-related tech failures in their Queen Anne Craftsman. Today, we're a team of 20+ specialists designing systems that thrive in our damp climate.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our smart home services.

How do you protect electronics from Seattle's dampness?

We use marine-grade seals on outdoor components and install dehumidifier links that trigger at 60% RH—critical for basements in Ravenna's clay soil areas.

Can automation work with my 1940s knob-and-tube wiring?

Yes, we create hybrid systems that modernize functionality while maintaining vintage electrical where safe—a specialty for Wallingford's historic districts.

Reviews From Our Smart Home Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Summit preserved the 1930s character of our Admiral District home while adding invisible smart features. They replicated our original switch plates so perfectly even the landmark commission approved them. The humidity monitors behind our shiplap have already prevented what would've been serious dry rot."

Mika T. Historic Home Retrofits

"After three winters of dealing with a damp basement in our Maple Leaf rambler, Summit's sensors caught a tiny pipe leak before it became catastrophic. Their system knew the difference between normal Seattle seepage and an actual problem—something national companies' gear never managed."

Raj P. Leak Detection Systems

"Living in a soft-story building near the Seattle Fault, I needed security that wouldn't fail during a quake. Summit's breakaway camera mounts and seismic triggers give me peace of mind. During February's 4.3 tremor, the system stayed online while my neighbor's conventional alarms failed."

Eleanor W. Earthquake-Ready Security
